title: Data fusion
description: Framework for combining data from multiple sources to produce higher-quality information, with quality defined by application context.

definitions.definition: Framework for combining data from multiple sources to produce higher-quality information, with quality defined by application context.
definitions.sources:
- Wald L., A European proposal for terms of reference in data fusion. International Archives of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, Vol. XXXII, Part 7, 651-654, 1998
- [Wald L., Some terms of reference in data fusion. IEEE Transactions on Geosciences and Remote Sensing, 37, 3, 1190-1193, 1999.](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/763269)
